hero.title: Travel Smarter, Not Harder
hero.subtitle: Travel Planner — AI Smart Travel Planner
hero.footer_desc: The world's most intelligent trip architect is at your service. Craft your legacy of travel in minutes.

features.f1_desc: Get personalized day-by-day itineraries crafted by advanced AI.
features.f2_desc: Discover hidden gems and popular spots tailored to your taste.
features.f3_desc: Adjust dates and plans on the fly with real-time updates.
features.f4_desc: Stay within budget with cost estimates for every activity.
features.f5_desc: Plan for solo trips, couples, families, or friend groups.
features.f6_desc: Save itineraries and share them with your travel companions.

steps.s1_desc: Select your destination, dates, budget, and travel interests.
steps.s2_desc: Our advanced algorithms craft your perfect personalized roadmap.
steps.s3_desc: Fine-tune your itinerary and set off on your dream adventure.

greeting.desc: Your next great adventure is just a heartbeat away. Where shall we wander today?

trending_page.subtitle: Exploring the internet's most trending spots and matching them with your unique Travel DNA.

dashboard.title: Travel Dashboard
dashboard.signin_prompt: Sign in to see your trips
dashboard.join_community: Join our community of travelers to save itineraries and access them anywhere.
dashboard.future_adventures: Your future adventures are waiting to be planned. Let's start now!
dashboard.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this trip? This action cannot be undone.

profile.bio_placeholder: Tell us about yourself and your travel style...
profile.success_desc: Your profile has been saved successfully.
profile.error_desc: Failed to save profile. Please try again.

dest_detail.ai_ready: Our AI is ready to architect your perfect mission. Customized for your interests and budget.

reviews.title: Reviews & Ratings
reviews.placeholder: Share your experience or tips for other travelers...
reviews.signin: Sign in to leave a review
reviews.save_to_review: Save your itinerary to enable reviews
reviews.no_reviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to share your thoughts!

not_found.title: 404 - Expedition Lost
not_found.desc: It seems you've wandered into uncharted territory. Our neural maps don't show any destination here.

footer.tagline: Your AI-powered travel companion. Plan smarter, travel better.

planner.title: Design Your Legacy of Exploration
planner.subtitle: Fuel your wanderlust with AI-driven precision and cinematic insight.
